title: Beyond the Absolute Limit
wikitext:
__NOEDITSECTION____NOTOC__ [[File:Beyond The Absolute Limit.png|frameless|1px]] {{DISPLAYTITLE:
Beyond The Absolute Limit
}}{{Background|file=Dark6.png}} {{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lexend+Peta:wght@600&display=swap'); :root { --theme-page-background-color: #000000; --theme-page-background-color--secondary: #000000; --theme-page-text-color: white; --theme-community-header-color: #FFFFFF; --theme-link-color: #0000FF; --theme-accent-label-color: white; }}
{{Headerbox|file=Beyond The Absolute Limit.png|header=Below is a Classified document; please login to access.}} {{Login|organization=M.E.G.|username=MEGdaviboim2|password=everydaygetsdarker2003|body=
''Elapsed time: 0.0002 seconds.''
'''daviboimlogfolderbtal FOLDER FOUND - CLICK TO ACCESS'''
'''LOG-1.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
I'm '''Davi Boim''' and I'm thirty-six-years-old, I'm a veteran M.E.G. Researcher who takes important roles in the exploration and understanding of [[Backrooms Wiki|'''The Backrooms''']]. Today is October 22nd 2034 and my team has found two confirmed exits of [[Absolute Infinity of Unknown|'''Absolute Infinity of Unknown''']] after dozens of weeks of tiring exploring. This experience could've been better if I had time to enjoy my stay in this level and was not busy all the time juggling all my tasks, paperwork, and sanity trying to find a way out. One of the exits has taken us to an unknown and unexplored level of which I generated the temporary name of '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''. This starts the exploration of '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω''', this unnamed level is a sub-level of [[Absolute Infinity of Unknown|'''Absolute Infinity of Unknown''']], the level where we came from. After extensive exploration in the parent level of '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω''' our operatives and researchers have found two anomalous air-tight doors with each leading to [[Level 0|'''Level 0''']] and this place, field studies will begin shortly.
'''LOG-2.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω.verycool'''
Straight into opinions and first impressions here, sub-level '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω''' seems to take place in an oil rig, I know this type of architecture and infrastructure like the back of my hand because when I was younger I used to work in an oil rig for five years as a '''Rig Medic''', the machinery fills me with memories of my time in the platforms when I would treat horrible injuries, deep burns, and drowning on the rest of the workers. The operatives were wearing short-sleeved uniforms so they started to put on jackets to cover the skin, my previous experiences with machinery like these in [[Backrooms Wiki|'''The Backrooms''']] were slightly ugly, so I don't need anyone of my team to get their skin and muscles burned and their bones tickled. I've attached an image with this log, consider it the first photo of sub-level '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''. [[File:Unexpected Hallway.png|frameless|400px|center]]
'''LOG-3.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
Looks like we've found the control room of this rig, looks just like home. There are no windows in this room so I can't look outside, there doesn't seem to be any doors either that could take us to the deck, but we've just 5 hours into exploration so there has to be more. I can hear dull and hollow drumming from the outside, sounds like it's some heavy rain out there, we haven't had a single glimpse to the exterior though. It has been 17 hours, we've found a lot more machinery, a medical wing, locker-room and showers, cafeteria and some dorms. About the medical wing... we haven't had a deeper look into it and its supplies, but it looks clean and sterile. We can't get into the cafeteria as the entrance is locked, and there is no need to start destroying and kicking things down for now so we chose to just go to sleep and continue tomorrow. !!!!!!!!!!!!FUTURE DAVI REMEMBER TO TEST THE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT WITH THE MACHINE YOU DON'T KNOW THE NAME OF THAT LOOKS LIKE A DUCK!!!!!!!! I've settled in this bedroom and '''Misha''' is going to sleep in the room with me. He's a seasoned M.E.G. Trooper so I trust him with my unconscious body incase something bad happens, like a heart attack or something else. '''Misha's''' mute but he knows how to fight and protect. It looks like this room has been inhabited by previous occupants, there are these jumpsuits hanging on the wall, one red and one blue, and one of them has the nametag "'''Jared Willeitner'''". I doubt any ''Jareds'' have actually existed and lived here and this was probably just generated here from the moment this level was created or something, there are some personal photos hanging on the wall and they consist mainly of men, some of them are wearing these worker  [[File:Limit Control Room.png|frameless|400px|center]] [[File:Unusual Dorms.png|frameless|400px|center]]
'''LOG-4.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω.strangeevent'''
That was embarrassing, I fell asleep while I was typing and hit my head against the keyboard, and I can't even edit previous logs. Today me and the other researchers are going to use the duck machine to test the medical equipment. Holding the equipment in my hands and taking a closer look, they look safe, I know the expiration date says 1995 but we're not sure when does sub-level '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω''' take place or if the medical equipment have special properties that makes them safe to use indefinitely. The pills here are a bit weird... they all have different shapes and colors but the labeling says they're all this weird '''Omnitherapine-6P''' medicine I've never heard of in my life. when I put it in the machine it spits back out the same thing, how does this M.E.G. graded machine knows this term but no staff knows it, at least to my knowledge? Update: tested most supplies here and all of them have at least a tiny trace of this '''Omnitherapine-6P''', at least they're being honest as the packaging loudly reveals that with big fonts. I do not trust whatever this medicine is. Just remembered I needed to put this in the previous log, all forms of text in sub-level '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω''' are apparently translated to a person's native language, '''Dimitriy''' is Ukrainian and he mentioned that the warning signs in the control room were written in Ukrainian, '''Mark''' who's Swedish also mentioned the signs being written in Swedish. And that the windows in the bedrooms don't actually lead to the outside, it looks like to be a TV displaying the exterior behind the glass, I've checked the other rooms but no windows display the same video, I noticed some of them show a part of the hull of the megastructure and there's something in the staircase besides it, though I cannot distinguish what it is. So something weird happened, the gravity just disappeared, like, there's no gravity anymore. This is concerning but it's not impossible to maneuver around the hallways yet, so I have my mind worried on more important things. Gravity is over, I was about to end and submit this log but gravity has just returned to normal, it should be noted that me and my team were plunged into zero gravity for about 8 hours.
'''LOG-5.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω.fuckshitfuckshitfuckshit'''
It seems like after the gravity was affected the air-tight door we came from got locked or jammed or something, as we cannot open it anymore, so it looks like we're stuck here until we either: find an exit, get the door open again, or wait for help to come to open the door. Ok so, we have heard a really loud bang and it was the cafeteria door, it looks like it has burst into tiny metal chunks and we can now enter the room and tests the supplies inside, if there are any. The tap water apparently is safe for consumption, the duck machine hasn't said anything alarming that we should woshITFuC K Kjhgrewqa
'''LOG-6.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω.critial'''
OK so im panickig , '''MIsha''' was near he stove and it fucking excploded on him, and also his asssault rifle exploded and it broke his fingers and it put a giant disgusting wound on his neck thats is like 5 inches deep ,the rifle and the stove like formed into one like they were pulled buy some sort of magnetic disturbance as a pulsating metal ball the last pesron that died on my wwatch was 13 YEARS AGO THIS IS NOT HAPPENING AGAIN '''MISHA''' IS GNOT GOING TO DIE
'''LOG-7.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
Ok I have time to breathe, sorry for the unprofessionalism but this wasn't what I was expecting from today, I sworn this would never again considering the event is still burned into my mind even after all these years. But I should probably stop thinking about it. We rushed '''Misha''' to the medical wing and managed to get him stable, we had to cut off all his clothing with scissors because when that thing exploded right at his face the fabric of the uniform fused with his skin. I'm grateful that we managed to act in time and prevent any infections or complications, I pray that '''Misha''' will have a speedy recovery. And also I've made a discovery: we are not in an off-shore oil rig, I found some sort of Sci-Fi airlock room with astronaut suits, and there is this long rounded hallway with a door at the end and I think this leads to the outside. I'll have to take a further look at it before I think of exploring the space vacuum, I have imbedded a photo of the airlock in this log. I'll make a report about '''Misha's''' injuries later. [[File:Freaky Airlock.png|frameless|400px|center]]
'''LOG-8.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
The food has just been tested, I've ran it through the machine and it isn't saying anything too alarming. I don't recommend this but I just tried eating some salted Japanese peanuts... It looks fine, doesn't taste like human flesh, my throat is not burning or melting, doesn't taste rotten, and the texture and flavor is just what i expected from this.
'''LOG-9.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
'''DaVante''' found a weird chicken burger, it is rock solid and makes an opaque rocky sound when we knock on it, but it still smells like a burger... The duck machine rejected this strange object. I think I'll just throw this away. I'll test the rest of the supplies later.
'''LOG-10.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
I found this strange balloon, it was floating stuck against the ceiling but when I approached it popped and candy came out of the balloon fragments. Actually the candy is just this '''Omnitherapine-6P''' again but coated in chocolate, everything's coated in chocolate, even the candies that say strawberry, peppermint, etc. This is strange.
'''LOG-11.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω'''
I've written a detailed document about '''Misha's''' injuries in the '''M.E.G. Personnel Injury Database''', if anyone wants to take a look the file id is "'''0H-8zkqmI0I'''".
'''LOG-12.LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω.adept'''
It has been one month since we've discovered sub-level '''LVL-∞Ξ/BAI-0x7F9E-AE13-Ω''' and other than '''Misha's''', there has been very few injuries and only minor injuries... I've managed to keep all of my team alive so far and I couldn't be more grateful. The A.D.E.P.T. is here.
'''LOG-13.beyond_the_absolute_limit'''
Let me get to some explaining, the '''A.D.E.P.T.''' ('''Advanced Deployment & Equipment Protectors Team''') is a [[The Frontrooms|'''Frontrooms''']] organization, not many people here knows about them but I do since I've personally interacted with them before getting here. What confuses me is why they're here, why the '''Backrooms''' out of all places. '''Nikolas Sunderland''' is here and he kinda scared me a little bit, I mean, you have you meet him he's the hunk of a man. Niko is very tall and bearded, and he wears a black leather uniform like the ones police officers used to wear before the 2000's with a peaked cap, aviator sunglasses as well as an '''A.D.E.P.T.''' cape. He's very intimidating and could scare anyone who does not expect him. I've gave him some questions and I'm going to summarize the interchange: I asked why and how they got here and '''Niko''' replies that the '''A.D.E.P.T.''' decided to expand their services and duty area to the '''Backrooms''' and that they've made the spaceship, which is how they got here. '''Niko''' didn't go into detail about the spaceship part but that he cannot return using the same way he got in. Before I could say anything else he said that I should call this sub-level '''Beyond The Absolute Limit''', makes sense so I guess I'm sticking with it anyway. I asked if '''Niko''' knew anything about the '''Omnitherapine-6P''' and he jolted straight like he was waiting for me to ask about it all this time, I'll quote him on this: "Ok so, this is a fun one, this is basically a drug that can cure all diseases and can seal up all wounds, but with a side effect of putting your body into full paralysis for 6 hours, it's like when your computer has a problem and you shut it down and when you turn it back up everything is fixed, but some patients report terrible hallucinations when paralyzed that seem to follow them into their dreams if they fall asleep, but I have never experienced that." After this he asked if he could stay here, not like I had a choice I let him sleep in the same room as me, he then left to smoke some cigarettes and after that everyone went to bed.
'''LOG-14.beyond_the_absolute_limit'''
Got it wrong, always mix it up, it's '''Advanced Deployment & Equipment Protectors Tactics''', it's Tactics, not Team. Ok so. Today '''Nikolas''' helped me into the astronaut suits along with two other operatives and researchers and we walked down the rounded hallway to leave the spaceship, he quickly explained to me about the magnetic rings that cradle the spaceship would help us keep within the momentum of the ship. This sight was none like I've ever seen in my professional career, it was awe-inducing and almost hypnotizing just seeing the stars rapidly shifting as the spacecraft warped through the space and the smooth and sleek architecture of the spaceship. I took a picture of the structure and started analyzing the environment. The spaceship is apparently named '''SABBA-09''' by some fading paintjob on the hull, it is Non-Euclidean as the interior of the ship is much different in size and proportions as the more compact exterior, the materials of the metallic hull consists of dozens of inches of portions of tungsten, diamond, and stainless steel all coated with special thermal paint and there is a hydrogen-rich layer between the layers. Two immense magnetic rings are connected through the spacecraft using three fortified beams perfectly evened 120 degrees from each other for each ring, between them there seems to be a region in constant state of '''Hyper-accelerated Stasis''' which causes a blinding glow. The interior of the ship mimics an off-shore oil rig, the exterior is a futuristic looking spaceship. My Geiger counter was constantly ticking which suggested a large amount of radiation in the outside, though inside the ship was fine meaning that the hull is successfully preventing deadly radiation doses from entering and affecting the people inside. Now that I'm thinking, I'm not sure how would radiation affect a Non-Euclidean structure coming from the outside and entering an interior much larger than the exterior. I just returned to the interior of the ship along with my crew and '''Niko''', walking into the control room I noticed that there are now windows on the walls and ceilings revealing the same sight I saw when I was outside. Update on '''Misha''': He's currently in a stable condition and breathing, though unconscious, one thing that made me feel great is when I grabbed his hand and he lightly squeezed my hand for just a moment. This was an intense day, I'm going to sleep. Something came to my mind: is the sub-level '''Beyond The Absolute Limit''' everything, or is its bounds concentrated at just the spaceship and the space... is something else? I do not have enough information to answer that. [[File:Beyond The Absolute Limit.png|frameless|400px|center]]
'''LOG-15.beyond_the_absolute_limit.finalfrontier'''
Today is December 1st, last month of the year. The mission has been very successful and we've started grasping at the properties of '''Beyond The Absolute Limit''' and its parent level, today '''Misha''' opened his eyes and looked right at me, if he wasn't mute he'd already be talking to me, but I won't complain, he's perfect as how he is. '''Misha''' is still bed-ridden but he's getting better and better, and I expect him to be able to regain full bodily control by next week. I need to point out a few events that have happened with me and my team throughout this expedition: *Magnetic Disturbances: Major one happened with '''Misha''', 3 more instances of them happened in a minor scale with other objects within the interior of '''SABBA-09'''. *Quantum Echo: Some members of my team have reported hearing themselves indefinitely and felt time distorting, this was temporary. *Gravity Changes: one time in the entire mission gravity had been changed to the moon's gravity for a few hou
'''LOG-16.beyond_the_absolute_limit.finalfrontier2'''
Ok so I found another event that rudely interrupted me as I was writing the fifteenth log, I'll continue: *Electromagnetic Storms: This ravaged the ship's electronic systems and my laptop as well for one straight week, and I had to occupy myself with the pool tables and other things while I waited. *Memory Fog: I don't remember this happening by I swear it happened, in certain parts of the ship this happens. *Blackouts: It was infuriating watching the fuses, batteries and all the stuff magically dislodging from the machinery and floating around the ship then I had to catch all of them in zero gravity. *Reality Shards: Two operatives of my team had found these weird crystals, touching them induces vivid and strange hallucinations mostly about existential fear. We threw them away. That should be it for now. I asked for '''Niko's''' age and he said he was thirty-eight-years-old, he looked like ten fifteen years older than me, not just two. '''Nikolas''' talked to me, I didn't understand the terms very well but I could understand that the '''A.D.E.P.T.''' apparently has the power to go out of the [[The Frontrooms|'''Frontrooms''']] and into the '''backrooms''' and vice versa at will. '''Niko''' said that we can warp '''SABBA-09''' to the Earth's orbit using the control room, but I have no idea how would that work. '''Niko''' has smoked a whole pack of cigarettes in a single day, I hope he's alright, I know he's a heavy smoker but still.
'''LOG-17.beyond_the_absolute_limit.hell'''
Recently a terrible event has happened to me and only now I've finally recovered to be able to type again, I'll be describing everything in chronological order: It was December 26th and I woke up with the heavy smell of nicotine, then I noticed a trail of pools of water leading to the cafeteria, I then saw '''Nikolas'''. He turned around and the moment I saw him without the sunglasses I realized he had no eyes, there was carved bloody holes and misplaced skin in the place of his eye sockets and small white pupils at the bottom, he lunged at me with his mouth so wide open that his lips were starting to tear apart. It bit down my wrist and I could feel the muscles tearing and the bones cracking on how strong was the clenching of his jaw and the pain was hellish, the worst pain I've ever felt in the '''backrooms''', that '''thing''' wouldn't let go so I grabbed my pistol and shot it in its temple...
THE. BLOOD. WAS. FUCKING. '''CLEAR.'''
 It was still moving and was biting even harder. I couldn't focus on anything else and just wanted to collapse and wait for my suffering to end, until a figure appeared behind this [[Entity 10|'''FUCKER''']] and shot it with a giant revolver. Its guts flew everywhere and then the figure that I could barely distinguish amidst the unbearable pain grabbed a pill, it then reached its hand deep into my throat and inserted the pill which I think i almost felt my throat tearing apart. I was choking and bleeding until I eventually dropped unconscious. I had found myself in my best friend's house, the colors were bright and vibrant, the dream was lucid, I was exploring my friend's house when I saw my childhood friend... '''Nikolas Sunderland''', besides him was a terrible amalgam of loose flesh and skin attempting to look like '''Niko''', we hugged... We were just teenagers. 6 hours had passed and I woke up laying on a bed which '''Nikolas''', the real one, the one I trusted, was sitting on the edge, he was smoking a cigar and when he looked at me he offered it to me... I accepted the cigar and started smoking with him. '''Niko''' had saved my life by forcefully feeding me the '''Omnitherapine-6P''' pill, and because of the paralysis I remembered something important. But I don't understand, if this is the real '''Niko''', who was the [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealer''']], [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealers''']] cannot create clones, they infect a person and become them... eat their bodies from the inside, was it really a [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealer''']]? It had to be, the blood was clear, are there cloning [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealers''']] now? I don't know, this is confusing.
'''LOG-18.beyond_the_absolute_limit'''
I'm still finding it hard to comprehend what happened earlier, last time I've dealt with a [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealer''']] was over 10 years ago so I don't understand a lot. And too, whatever happened to me doesn't correlate with the papers, this isn't what a normal [[Entity 10|'''Skin-Stealer''']] does, it's weird. I haven't been doing much, feel like I should get back to doing work very soon, and document more stuff. I do have physical notes I've written throughout the expedition, but they all seem so blurry... Like they do not want to be read or something. I don't know.
'''LOG-19.beyond_the_absolute_limit'''
Today is December 28th, my team along with '''Nikolas''' started trying to understand the machinery of '''SABBA-09''', most of the buttons are not labelled or are only in numbers, '''Niko''' said there is a pattern in these buttons but he doesn't know it yet as the spaceship is new. There is this space travel map but it is completely pitch black, there are no celestial bodies, though it has been hastily drawn on with a red and blue pen. So we apparently have to get to the location circled on the map, but there are very ambiguous measurements in the paper. Quick thing here, so we found the real bridge. '''Nikolas''' got close to a wall and started kicking it down, then it opened into a door, as we removed the debris we entered it and showed the another control room but this one was more logical. There is this simulator besides a fire extinguisher and it should help us with the trajectory back to earth, apparently there are celestial bodies but they're too dim to be seen with the naked eye. I've never studied astronomy anyway and just have basic concepts in my mind. '''Niko''' started typing a long stream of numbers, letters, and symbols into the terminal as entered it, it spout out "'''26.MILLION.LIGHTYEARS-427.ORBITALS-190672.SECONDS-WARP.IN:43%'''", I think it means the distance and time of the travel and at what part of the travel warping will begin, I think the orbitals mean how many celestial bodies' orbits '''SABBA-09''' will enter in the way but I'm not sure. '''Nikolas''' walked me to this comically large red button at the center of the bridge and told me to have the honor of taking the ship home, I looked out into the void then back at the button, but for some reason I was reluctant of pressing it even if i trust him... '''Niko''' pressed the button for me, and it was so big he had to use both of his hands to push it, and his hands are large. After the button clicked in like a switch '''Nikolas''' tapped my shoulder and then started feeling around the control room panels to understand the pattern. I think he figured it out... ''Now we wait''...
'''LOG-20.beyond_the_absolute_limit.daybefore'''
Today is December 30th, '''Pluto''' and '''Charon''' just passed by the window, I just can't believe we're actually doing this, as far as they are from the spaceship, like tens of thousands of kilometers, I think '''Pluto''' and '''Charon''' are beautiful both visually and symbolically. '''Charon''' was put into orbit by not violently crushing '''Pluto''', but a light tap on the surface, a cosmic kiss, and when they became tidally locked it is an eternal dance in this miasmic blackness, and they stare each other down like a test of loyalty. After all these eons they dance, trusting each other, unbothered by the hostile environment around them. Ok sorry for the tangent, I just couldn't help it. We're bulleting through the solar system like I'd never expect to be possible, we have passed by '''Saturn''' and the sun is getting closer, and '''Earth''' as well, I know i already said this, but I just cannot believe we're actually doing this, this is beautiful in an infinite amount of ways. Today is December 31st, I was so thrilled I didn't see the day passing by so quickly, no one has gone to sleep and we're just looking through the windows seeing magic happen, this is exciting for everyone and I couldn't be more happier for them. '''Misha''' is back and he has completely recovered, he is celebrating in his on way and it melts my heart. There it is, there it fucking is. We're on '''Earth's''' orbit and I can see my home from up here. We've received radio signals, the '''A.D.E.P.T.''' just talked to us, '''Nikolas''' took the radio and started explaining the situation, then in mere minutes A.D.E.P.T. Troopers started knocking on the airlock and boarded the spaceship, they went to the bridge and started pressing some secret buttons I didn't knew existed. So the ship started moving on its own and it looks like it is going to couple with with the '''International A.D.E.P.T. Station'''. Last time I've been here this station wasn't here before, so it is something new. Ok so some troopers put us on a little ship and are taking us down to '''Earth''', it has been over 20 hours since I've slept but I'm filled with adrenaline so I couldn't fall asleep even if I wanted to. We are in the '''A.D.E.P.T. Headquarters''' in '''Liminal County''', the county I was born in. This building is just as I remember, such great memories. We're going to talk to '''Archie''', the director and founder of this place, I cannot wait. '''Archie''' just hugged each one of us, he seems happy, and proud even to see me succeed, he took us to the '''A.D.E.P.T. Personnel Resort''' to take as nap as we'd need it. He said to meet us at the rooftop at 2300. '''Misha''' offered me some water but I refused it, the thought of a clear liquid makes me sick now and probably will be for some time. But I can't really stop drinking water so I'll have to get over it eventually. I drank some soda and started gagging, I should probably rest. Should note that when i took the '''Omnitherapine-6P''' out of the ship it disappeared from my pockets, I cannot take it to earth and I assume the same will be for other '''backrooms''' levels. Oh and also, some '''A.D.E.P.T.''' operatives brought me to this insulated room with thick steel walls guarded by heavy duty doors. There is this large and bulky machine labelled "B-N.006" and it makes a deafening noise, I think this is what is connecting my tablet to the [[Phenomenon 2|'''BACK-NET''']]. I didn't know this was possible but I shouldn't underestimate the '''A.D.E.P.T.'''. Note that I wasn't allowed to take photos of this room.
'''LOG-21.beyond_the_absolute_limit.happynewyear'''
My brother is here, '''Archie''' took his time to call my brother and managed to get him here in time, I can't believe this... We're in the rooftop, looking at the horizon and waiting for the waterfront to combust into beautiful fireworks. There are thousands of people beneath us, I can't distinguish if they're normal civilians or '''A.D.E.P.T.''' personnel but they all seem eager to watch the show. Today is January 1st, a new year. The fireworks are flying, at first I was behind, a bit reluctant to stay with others, but as I watched them smiling and jumping I felt like I had to approach. I can't believe this moment would ever happen, seeing my brother again as I breathe '''Earth's''' air once again and celebrating with all the people I care about. I love every single person who is here with me and it makes me happy seeing them happy. I guess this concludes the logs of '''Beyond the Absolute Limit''', I'll return and turn the logs in, as it is my duty of course, but I'm afraid I'll keep this private. I don't think it is worth spreading this to the public, specially after the incident with '''Absolute Infinity Of The Unknown''', yeah I won't publish this, it's for the best. I'll share this to Niko though, I think he'll enjoy my narration. Whoever is reading this I hope you have a good New Year, stay safe and happy! Goodbye! [[File:Happy Ending.png|frameless|400px|center]]
. . . . . . . . . . . . A viscious cycle I must not surrender to! . . . . . . . . . . . .
'''Credits!'''
Rewritten by [[User:Mark The Countrydoge|'''Mark The Countrydoge''']] Rancid and Vile original level written by [[User:Mark The Countrydoge|'''Mark The Countrydoge''']], bleach your eyes today [[User:Mark The Countrydoge/Beyond The Absolute Limit|'''here''']]. Thank you for reading and I hope you had fun.
Happy New Year to everyone!
}}
